recommendations.title: Godzilla x Kong: The New Empire
recommendations.overview: Following their explosive showdown, Godzilla and Kong must reunite against a colossal undiscovered threat hidden within our world, challenging their very existence – and our own.

recommendations.title: Blair Witch
recommendations.overview: Students on a camping trip discover something sinister is lurking beyond the trees.

recommendations.title: The Guest
recommendations.overview: A soldier introduces himself to the Peterson family, claiming to be a friend of their son who died in action. After the young man is welcomed into their home, a series of accidental deaths seem to be connected to his presence.

recommendations.title: You're Next
recommendations.overview: When the Davison family comes under attack during their wedding anniversary getaway, the gang of mysterious killers soon learns that one of their victims harbors a secret talent for fighting back.

recommendations.title: Death Note
recommendations.overview: Light Turner finds a supernatural notebook and uses it to mete out death, attracting the attention of a detective, a demon and a girl in his class.

recommendations.title: Godzilla vs. SpaceGodzilla
recommendations.overview: A mysterious extraterrestrial being resembling Godzilla rapidly approaches Earth. The monster, dubbed SpaceGodzilla, lands to challenge the King of the Monsters.

recommendations.title: Transformers: Rise of the Beasts
recommendations.overview: When a new threat capable of destroying the entire planet emerges, Optimus Prime and the Autobots must team up with a powerful faction known as the Maximals. With the fate of humanity hanging in the balance, humans Noah and Elena will do whatever it

recommendations.title: X-Men: Days of Future Past
recommendations.overview: The ultimate X-Men ensemble fights a war for the survival of the species across two time periods as they join forces with their younger selves in an epic battle that must change the past – to save our future.

recommendations.title: V/H/S/2

recommendations.director: Gareth Evans, Eduardo Sánchez, Timo Tjahjanto, Jason Eisener, Adam Wingard, Gregg Hale, Simon Barrett

recommendations.genres: Action, Adventure, Science Fiction, Fantasy, Thriller
